code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
for w in words
  let piece = match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  when None
    w
  end
  if first
    result = piece
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{piece}"
  end
end

println(result)
